title: Genital herpes - NHS
text:
the chance of an outbreak during birth from diagnosis until the birth if you first get herpes after week 28 of pregnancy Many women with genital herpes have a vaginal delivery. You may be offered a caesarean, depending on your circumstances.
Video: Genital herpes - Marian's story 
In this video, Marian, from Herpes Viruses Association, talks about the symptoms, treatment and issues surrounding herpes.
